about.title: About — AFOS Analytics
about.whoWeAreDesc: AFOS-Analytics is a global platform for real-time electoral intelligence.
about.whoWeAreDesc2: We monitor elections worldwide and transform complex data into clear, objective, and actionable information.
about.whoWeAreDesc3: We do this by combining, in a single environment:
whoWeAreList: international prediction markets with real money (such as Polymarket)
strategic analyses generated with artificial intelligence
about.whoWeAreFooter: All integrated into a simple, accessible panel that is continuously updated — on mobile or desktop.
about.whatForIntro: AFOS-Analytics exists to answer a simple question:
about.whatForQuestion: What is really happening in the election?
whatForList: follow the electoral race in real time — who leads, who grows, who loses momentum
see where the money is positioned — not just opinion, but real bets
compare polls vs market — what people say vs what the world bets
monitor events and scandals — and their direct impact on the election
track the political climate throughout the electoral cycle
make more informed decisions, based on data
voterList: see all candidates in one place
compare traditional polls with prediction markets
understand each candidate's strengths, weaknesses, and context
follow relevant events and decide with more clarity
about.investorTitle: If you're an INVESTOR / BUSINESS OWNER
investorList: anticipate political scenarios that impact the market
use prediction markets as an early indicator
understand how crises and events influence electoral results
track economic signals priced by the market
analystList: access consolidated data from multiple sources
use a unique cross-reference: polls × markets × narrative
produce analyses with more depth and precision
about.updatesPollsDesc: updated whenever new data is published
about.dashboardTitle: What you'll find on the dashboard
dashboardItems: Strategic analyses — candidates' strengths and weaknesses
Political Climate — cross-references of media and market
about.differentialDesc: AFOS-Analytics is a unique platform that connects, in the same place:
about.differentialFooter: This allows you to see the election from multiple perspectives — and not depend on a single source.
about.globalIntro: We started with practical validation, but the goal is bigger:
about.globalQuote: Track elections worldwide and create a new way to understand political risk on a global scale
about.globalDesc: It's not just one election. It's a system built for:
about.globalFooter: Where there's an election, there's a signal. Where there's a signal, AFOS-Analytics reads it.
about.openSourceDesc: AFOS-Analytics is an open source project.
about.openSourceFooter: Anyone can study, audit, and contribute.
about.afosDesc: AFOS is more than a name — it's what guides everything we do:
about.afosADesc: Intelligence to cross-reference data and generate clarity
about.afosFDesc: Verifiable impartiality in the treatment of every source
about.afosODesc: Analytical neutrality — we observe the data, we don't take sides
about.afosSDesc: Transforming complex data into simple understanding
about.essenceText: AFOS Analytics is not about opinion.
about.essenceSubtext: It's about understanding reality with more precision.

metas.title: Goals — AFOS Analytics
metas.centralThesisDesc: Governments, companies, and investors lose billions every year due to decisions based on fragmented, biased, or manipulated information.
centralThesisLines: When the voter votes without data,
when the business owner doesn't anticipate scenarios,
when the investor prices risk in the dark —
metas.centralThesisResult: the result is the same: economic inefficiency and instability.
metas.centralThesisResolution: AFOS Analytics solves this at the source:
metas.centralThesisQuote: Transform political information into actionable intelligence — as global infrastructure.
metas.economicImpactThermometer: creating a real-time political risk thermometer
economicImpactAllowsList: global investors to price risk with precision
metas.businessDecisionDesc: Companies begin to operate with anticipation:
metas.institutionalImpactDesc: More efficient democracies start with better information.
institutionalImpactList: consolidates multiple sources into a single panel
offers free, global, and multilingual access
metas.institutionalImpactFooter: raises the level of voting and public debate
metas.civicEducationDesc: The product doesn't just inform — it develops more sophisticated users.
metas.civicEducationIntro: It introduces, in a practical way:
civicEducationList: understanding political impact on the economy
metas.civicEducationFooter: creating a new generation of more rational citizens and investors.
accountabilityList: divergence between discourse and market expectations
metas.accountabilityFooter: AFOS creates objective pressure for transparency.
metas.internationalImpactIntro: AFOS Analytics positions any country that adopts it as:
metas.internationalImpactNoExist: There is currently no platform that integrates, on a global scale:
metas.globalPositioningDesc: Not media. Not a tool. It's infrastructure.
metas.globalPositioningQuote: a layer of political intelligence for global markets
metas.globalPositioningFooter: Both analyzing the same set of data.
metas.valueModel: Value Model (implicit, without polluting the message)
metas.valueModelFooter: with structured data and political intelligence APIs
systemicEffectChains: Transparency → Informed decision → Better representation → More efficient policies → Sustainable growth
Predictability → Investment → Employment → Income → Revenue → Better public services
Accountability → Less corruption → Better use of resources → Infrastructure → Quality of life
potentialImpactList: Millions of users with access to political intelligence
Global capital allocated with more precision
Civic and financial education at scale
metas.synthesisQuote: It is a global political intelligence infrastructure.
metas.synthesisFooter: While building a base of more educated users and more efficient markets.
metas.positioningFooter: is a system that grows faster and with more stability.
metas.tagline: Democracy runs on information. Information runs on transparency. AFOS Analytics is programmable transparency.

global.introDesc: The Global module of AFOS Analytics transforms the world election calendar into real-time intelligence.
global.introDesc2: The interactive map allows you to visualize, country by country:
global.introFooter: Creating a global thermometer of political risk and economic opportunity.
global.dataDesc: By interacting with the map, you access consolidated data combining:
global.howDesc: Each country on the map represents an active or upcoming election event.
global.howDesc2: Colors indicate the time horizon of elections:
howColorsList: light tones (interactive) → short-term elections (up to 12 months)
medium tones (interactive) → medium-term elections (1 to 3 years)
dark tones (non-interactive) → scheduled elections, date not yet defined
global.howFooter: Interaction indicates availability of detailed data.
global.clickDesc: The user accesses organized information such as:
global.clickFooter: Transforming the map into an interactive geopolitical decision interface, not just visualization.
global.calendarDesc: The system tracks elections continuously, on a global scale.
global.calendarDesc2: Every year, dozens of countries hold national elections — generating:
global.calendarFooter: The result is a continuous flow of events with real economic impact.
global.purposeDesc: The Global module is an infrastructure for systemic reading of the global political environment.
purposeList: monitor election cycles in real time
make decisions based on data, not narrative
global.execDesc: Global organizes this complexity into an interface that allows you to:
